name: Muselk
oneLine: Australian gaming YouTuber known for Team Fortress 2, Overwatch and Fortnite content with comedic challenge framing.
bio: Elliott Watkins, born 1994 and based in Sydney, built his early audience on Team Fortress 2 content before shifting to Overwatch gameplay and funny moments in late 2016 and then to Fortnite, where he sits at over 8 million subscribers. He is a founding member of the Click podcast and management collective alongside LazarBeam and others, and in January 2020 signed an exclusive YouTube streaming deal with Lannan Eacott.
